$comment: Dark-mode theme overrides. Populated in BRIEF-401 Phase 2.2 (2026-05-13). Override-only file: keys present here re-bind the corresponding semantic / component token under [data-theme="dark"]. Keys absent from this file inherit the light value. Surfaces sit at OKLCH L*≈0.18..0.28 (never pure black, halation-avoidance). Body text at L*≈0.72..0.93 (pure white reserved for high-emphasis headlines on inverse and very-high band text). Brand brightens (indigo-600 → indigo-500-equivalent) so white text clears 4.5:1. Risk-band hue families preserved; lightness lifted per band; band text flips to near-black where the lifted bg can sustain it (very-low / low / medium / high) and stays white where it can't (very-high). See artefacts/dark-mode-rationale.md. Sources: WCAG 2.2 (SC 1.4.3/1.4.6/1.4.11), Apple HIG Dark Mode (2024), IBM Carbon Dark theme (v11, 2024), Shopify Polaris dark-mode (2023), Ottosson OKLCH (2020). NOTE: this file is a partial-fidelity reconstruction of the originally-staged 72-token artefact (lost mid-pipeline 2026-05-13 — see PR description); 37 tokens with documented hex values from dark-mode-rationale.md + artefacts/dark-mode-canvas.html are included; tokens with only L*/C/H prose targets fall back to inheriting light until a follow-up pass enumerates them.

default.$description: Default surface — dark canvas, never pure black (OKLCH 0.18, 0.005, 240)

subtle.$description: Raised cards — one step up from default for elevation

muted.$description: Chips, table-row hover, panel canvases — two steps up

inverse.$description: Inverse surface — light in dark mode so modals/scrims/tooltips stay distinct

default.$description: Default body text — L* 0.925, clears 15:1 on default dark surface

subtle.$description: Secondary text — L* 0.725, clears 7.7:1 on default dark surface

on-action.$description: Text on action.primary — pure white, clears 4.9:1 on brightened brand

on-inverse.$description: Text on inverse (light) surface in dark mode

on-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle text on inverse surface in dark mode

subtle-on-muted.$description: Subtle text on muted surfaces — matches dark text.subtle (clears ≥4.5:1 on the dark muted surface; D-125b)

default.$description: Default border — L* 0.495, clears 3.0:1 on default dark surface (WCAG 1.4.11)

subtle.$description: Decorative-only border — L* 0.36, exempt from 3:1 under WCAG 1.4.11 decorative carve-out

focus.$description: Focus ring — indigo-400, clears 6.3:1 on default dark surface

inverse.$description: Border on inverse surface in dark mode

primary.$description: Brightened brand for dark mode (OKLCH 0.555, 0.180, 268). 4.92:1 vs white text; 3.82:1 vs default dark surface; hue identical to light brand

primary-subtle.$description: Muted indigo wash for ghost/secondary hover on dark canvas

primary-hover.$description: Primary action hover — lifts a half-step

link.$description: Interactive text on dark canvas — brightened indigo, clears 5.1:1 on surface.default (the dark action.primary fill sits at 3.8:1, below the 4.5:1 text floor)

plot-area-bg.$description: Chart plot-area fill — slightly raised from default surface so chart canvas reads

legend-bg.$description: Chart legend background — matches surface.subtle for elevation parity

tooltip-text.$description: Chart tooltip text — matches text.default for legibility on tooltip surface

axis.$description: Chart axis line on dark canvas — clears 3:1

tooltip-surface.$description: Chart tooltip surface on dark canvas

tooltip-border.$description: Chart tooltip border on dark canvas

1.$description: Chart categorical 1 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

2.$description: Chart categorical 2 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

3.$description: Chart categorical 3 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

4.$description: Chart categorical 4 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

5.$description: Chart categorical 5 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

6.$description: Chart categorical 6 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

7.$description: Chart categorical 7 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

8.$description: Chart categorical 8 — lifted for dark canvas (L ≥ 0.72, chroma capped; hue carries identity)

1.$description: Chart sequential 1 — dark ramp ascends dark→bright so emphasis still reads upward

2.$description: Chart sequential 2 — dark ramp ascends dark→bright so emphasis still reads upward

3.$description: Chart sequential 3 — dark ramp ascends dark→bright so emphasis still reads upward

4.$description: Chart sequential 4 — dark ramp ascends dark→bright so emphasis still reads upward

5.$description: Chart sequential 5 — dark ramp ascends dark→bright so emphasis still reads upward

0.$description: Diverging neutral — re-anchored on the dark neutral axis

n2.$description: Diverging strong negative — lifted for dark canvas

n1.$description: Diverging negative — lifted for dark canvas

p1.$description: Diverging positive — lifted for dark canvas

p2.$description: Diverging strong positive — lifted for dark canvas

null.$description: Null-marker fill — reads as recess against dark plot area, below all data stops

bg.$description: Very-low band bg — lifted emerald (L* 0.70) so dark text clears 7.8:1

text.$description: Very-low band text — near-black, flipped from light-mode white (audit §3.2 light-mode contrast fix landed in dark via lift-and-flip)
Low band text — near-black, clears 10.6:1 on lifted lime
Medium band text — near-black, clears 9.3:1 on lifted amber
High band text — near-black, flipped from light-mode white (audit §3.2 fix). Clears 7.4:1 on lifted orange

bg.$description: Very-high band bg — saturated red (L* 0.585). Text stays white because the saturated red still wants the white contrast

text.$description: Very-high band text — pure white (4.7:1 vs bg, the only band that doesn't flip in dark mode)

track.$description: Gauge track — L* 0.33 so the inactive arc reads against the dark canvas

arc-teal.$description: Gauge teal arc — brightened (OKLCH 0.745, 0.130, 178). 8.8:1 vs default dark surface

arc-indigo.$description: Gauge indigo arc — matches action.primary so brand-coloured gauges + CTAs share visual coherence

arc-stone.$description: Gauge arc — stone outer ring (dual-ring delta)

low.$description: Risk band — low; matches the dark band.very-low treatment (lifted, hue preserved)

medium.$description: Risk band — medium; matches the dark band.medium treatment (lifted, hue preserved)

high.$description: Risk band — high; matches the dark band.high treatment (lifted, hue preserved)

critical.$description: Risk band — critical; matches the dark band.very-high treatment (lifted, hue preserved)

low-text.$description: Positive-valence text — lifted emerald, ≥4.5:1 on dark canvas

critical-text.$description: Negative-valence text — lifted red, ≥4.5:1 on dark canvas

surface-default.$description: Citation chip surface — default; matches surface.subtle on dark

surface-low-conf.$description: Citation chip surface — low-confidence; one step up for differentiation

border-default.$description: Citation chip border — default; decorative rule on dark

border-retracted.$description: Citation chip border — retracted; raised a step so the strikethrough state reads

text-default.$description: Citation chip text — default; matches text.subtle scale, clears 4.5:1 on chip surface

text-retracted.$description: Citation chip text — retracted; dimmed below text.subtle but still ≥4.5:1 on the chip surfaces (A11Y-FIX: the first derivation sat at L 0.55 ≈ 3.5:1, axe-confirmed failure)

icon-default.$description: Citation chip source-type glyph — clears 3:1 non-text on chip surface

hover.$description: Citation chip hover overlay — one step above the chip surface

active.$description: Citation chip active/pressed overlay — one step above hover

healthy.$description: Telemetry collector healthy — matches dark band.very-low emerald lift

degraded.$description: Telemetry collector degraded — matches dark band.medium amber lift

failed.$description: Telemetry collector failed — lifted red, hue preserved

disabled.$description: Telemetry collector disabled — neutral, deliberately low-emphasis

adoption.$description: Telemetry event class adoption — matches dark gauge teal

error.$description: Telemetry event class error — lifted red-600 hue

usage.$description: Telemetry event class usage — matches dark action.primary indigo

performance.$description: Telemetry event class performance — matches dark band.high orange lift

accent.$description: Iris accent — lifted teal; clears 4.5:1 as text on dark canvas and keeps ≥3:1 under white glyphs (v4.3 §4.2)

accent-hover.$description: Iris accent hover — lifts a half-step on dark (light darkens; dark brightens)

accent-subtle.$description: Iris accent subtle — muted teal wash for halos/hover on dark canvas

surface.$description: Iris surface — dark teal-tinted stone (§B1), one step above the canvas

thinking-outer.$description: IrisThinking outer arc — brightest of the depth gradient on dark

thinking-inner.$description: IrisThinking inner arc — dimmest, still clears the 3:1 non-text floor

background.$description: Info callout background — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

border.$description: Info callout border — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

icon.$description: Info callout icon — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

background.$description: Warning callout background — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

border.$description: Warning callout border — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

icon.$description: Warning callout icon — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

background.$description: Danger callout background — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

border.$description: Danger callout border — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

icon.$description: Danger callout icon — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

background.$description: Success callout background — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

border.$description: Success callout border — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)

icon.$description: Success callout icon — lifted intent hue for dark (bg is 10%-alpha-blended in-component)
